---
title: "Death Summary"
subtitle: "Summary of Deaths"
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: true
---


```{r}
#| label: prereqs
#| include: false
library(arframe)
fr_theme(hlines = "header", font_family = "Courier New")
```

## Setup

See [Prerequisites](../install.qmd) for installation instructions.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(arframe)
library(pharmaverseadam)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(tidyr)

blank_to_na <- function(df) {
  df[] <- lapply(df, function(x) {
    if (is.character(x)) x[x == ""] <- NA_character_
    x
  })
  df
}

adsl_saf <- pharmaverseadam::adsl |>
  blank_to_na() |>
  filter(SAFFL == "Y", TRT01A != "Screen Failure")

arm_levels <- c("Placebo", "Xanomeline Low Dose", "Xanomeline High Dose")
arm_n <- setNames(
  vapply(arm_levels, function(a) sum(adsl_saf$TRT01A == a), integer(1L)),
  arm_levels
)
N_total <- nrow(adsl_saf)
n_vec   <- c(arm_n, Total = N_total)
```


## Data Preparation

```{r}
#| label: data-prep

# ── Deaths overall ──
death_by_arm <- adsl_saf |>
  group_by(TRT01A) |>
  summarise(
    n   = sum(DTHFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE),
    N   = n(),
    pct = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", n, n / N * 100),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  select(TRT01A, pct) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = pct)

total_deaths <- sum(adsl_saf$DTHFL == "Y", na.rm = TRUE)
death_overall <- death_by_arm |>
  mutate(
    category   = "Deaths",
    stat_label = "Deaths, n (%)",
    Total      = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", total_deaths, total_deaths / N_total * 100),
    .before    = 1
  )

# ── Deaths by cause (DTHCAUS) ──
adsl_deaths <- adsl_saf |>
  filter(DTHFL == "Y") |>
  mutate(DTHCAUS = if_else(is.na(DTHCAUS), "Unknown", DTHCAUS))

cause_levels <- sort(unique(adsl_deaths$DTHCAUS))

cause_rows <- lapply(cause_levels, function(cause) {
  by_arm <- adsl_saf |>
    group_by(TRT01A) |>
    summarise(
      n   = sum(DTHFL == "Y" & DTHCAUS == cause, na.rm = TRUE),
      N   = n(),
      pct = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", n, n / N * 100),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    select(TRT01A, pct) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = TRT01A, values_from = pct)

  total_n <- sum(adsl_saf$DTHFL == "Y" & adsl_saf$DTHCAUS == cause, na.rm = TRUE)
  by_arm |>
    mutate(
      category   = "Cause of Death",
      stat_label = tools::toTitleCase(tolower(cause)),
      Total      = sprintf("%d (%.1f)", total_n, total_n / N_total * 100),
      .before    = 1
    )
})

# ── Combine ──
death_wide <- bind_rows(death_overall, bind_rows(cause_rows)) |>
  mutate(across(
    all_of(c(arm_levels, "Total")),
    ~ replace_na(.x, "0 (0.0)")
  ))
```


## arframe Pipeline

The `fr_table()` pipeline is the same regardless of how the data was prepared:

```{r}
#| label: pipeline
#| eval: false
death_wide |>
  fr_table() |>
  fr_titles(
    "Table 14.3.1",
    "Summary of Deaths",
    "Safety Population"
  ) |>
  fr_cols(
    category   = fr_col(visible = FALSE),
    stat_label = fr_col("", width = 2.8),
    !!!setNames(
      lapply(arm_levels, function(a) fr_col(a, align = "decimal")),
      arm_levels
    ),
    Total = fr_col("Total", align = "decimal"),
    .n = n_vec
  ) |>
  fr_header(bold = TRUE, align = "center") |>
  fr_rows(
    group_by    = "category",
    group_label = "stat_label",
    group_bold  = TRUE,
    blank_after = "category"
  ) |>
  fr_footnotes(
    "Percentages based on N per treatment group.",
    "Death cause derived from ADSL DTHCAUS variable.",
    "CDISCPILOT01 Safety Population."
  )
```


## Rendered Table

```{r}
#| label: table
#| echo: false
#| ref.label: pipeline
```
